changes.before: Jaina reached for her own pommel and found herself doing the same before she had finished noticing it.
changes.after: Jaina reached for her own pommel and found herself doing the same.

changes.before: Could not. The distinction mattered to her if to no one else.
changes.after: The distinction mattered to her if to no one else.

changes.before: A sound rose, found nothing in itself worth becoming, and died.
changes.after: She made a sound and let it die.

changes.before: North where the prince had gone. North where the plague pointed. North where the next thing waited, whether it was source or trap or both.
changes.after: North where the prince had gone. North toward the coast. North toward whatever was still calling the dead from farther out.

changes.before: North where the prince had gone. North where the plague pointed. North where the next thing waited, whether it was source or trap or both.
changes.after: North where the prince had gone. North toward the coast. North toward whatever was still calling the dead from farther out.

changes.before: Both had found the clean answer and followed it past the point where another person could still slow them.
changes.after: Both had found the clean answer and kept going after the people beside them tried to slow them.

changes.before: The fear was simpler: she could keep following a line too far.
changes.after: The fear was simpler: she could keep chasing the answer after the bodies in front of her should have stopped her.
Something farther away was still setting it off.

changes.before: The bodies are answering something beyond the stock.
changes.after: The bodies are answering a signal beyond the stock.

changes.before: Ice. Open sea. The far source of too many things.
changes.after: Ice. Open sea. The far source of the plague.
